what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment pointing at board item item-5522c649, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
target uses the URI-style reference board://item-5522c649
standouts: Typed link to a board item via board:// URI
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target entity is referenced with a board:// scheme
concerns: No contextual payload beyond the metadata link
Target board item content is not included or described
notes: A bare metadata stub recording that board item item-5522c649 was attached to the dragnet-development channel on 2026-06-24.
questions: What content does board item item-5522c649 contain?
Who or what process created this attachment?
What triggered the attachment at this timestamp?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches what the file does: it records a typed, timestamped link from a channel to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a specific board item was attached to a channel conversation or memory stream.
novelty: The target is expressed as a board:// URI, which is slightly more structured than a plain identifier, but otherwise the file is a conventional metadata stub.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed edge between a channel and a board item, which a fused system could use to reconstruct when and how board content surfaced in channel context.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-5522c649 as a board_items attachment with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to record that a specific board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel at a known time.
